description: The 'GlobalNews' app needs to be updated for the Middle East market (RTL support). Enable RTL support in `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` by adding `android:supportsRtl="true"` to the application tag. In `app/src/main/res/layout/activity_profile.xml`, refactor all legacy directional attributes (Left/Right) to their modern equivalents (Start/End), including margins, padding, gravity, and alignment. Ensure the project builds successfully after these changes.
